events.tbaDescription: Date to be announced. Subscribe to our newsletter to be the first to know when registration opens!
events.registerDescription: Secure your spot at {location}. Seats are limited and first come, first served.
events.registrationOpensSoon: Registration will open soon. Check back later!

rsvpErrors.unableToRsvp: Unable to RSVP. Please refresh the page.
rsvpErrors.cancelFailed: Failed to cancel RSVP. Please try again.
rsvpErrors.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment.
rsvpErrors.alreadyRsvped: You've already RSVPed for this event.
rsvpErrors.createFailed: Failed to RSVP. Please try again.

events.rsvpClosedDescription: This event already happened. RSVPs are no longer available.
events.wrapUpTitle: That's a wrap. Thank you for joining us.
events.wrapUpDescription: We appreciate everyone who attended. If you have feedback, we'd love to hear from you.
events.speakerPreview: You can hear inspiring speakers like {names}.
events.noteFreeEntry: Entry is free. Just show up and grab a seat. We appreciate an RSVP so we can prepare.
events.noteFlexibleTimeline: We keep things loose. No strict schedule. We go with the flow.

questionsPage.description: Live event Q&A feed for speakers and attendees.
questionsPage.title: Questions feed

questions.title: Questions for speakers
questions.placeholder: Ask a question for the speakers...
questions.empty: No questions yet. Break the ice and ask the first one.
questions.replayEmpty: No questions were submitted for this event.
questions.windowUnavailable: Question window is unavailable for this event.
questions.windowClosedInfo: Questions open after the full speaker lineup is revealed.
questions.windowClosedHint: As soon as the full lineup is out, you can ask your question ahead of time so speakers can come prepared.
questions.replayInfo: Q&A replay: posting and boosting are closed. You can still browse all questions.

errors.profanity: Please keep questions respectful and profanity-free.
errors.deleteForbidden: You can only delete your own question.
